mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = #{id} FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (nickname, gender, age, password, phone, avatar, status, role, noshow_count, created_at) VALUES (#{nickname}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{password}, #{phone}, #{avatar}, #{status}, #{role}, #{noshowCount}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET nickname = #{nickname}, gender = #{gender}, age = #{age}, password = #{password}, phone = #{phone}, avatar = #{avatar}, status = #{status}, role = #{role}, noshow_count = #{noshowCount} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET status = CASE WHEN COALESCE(noshow_count, 0) + 1 >= #{threshold} THEN 'restricted' ELSE status END, noshow_count = COALESCE(noshow_count, 0) + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM users
AND (nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY id DESC
